test_cases.input: This feature is going to take 4 hours and I need to step away. How should we set up the handoff so the next agent can continue building the UI?
test_cases.rationale: Explicit cross-session orchestration and baton passing belongs in harness-design.

test_cases.input: I just finished the new login flow. Can you open the browser and verify the error states work as expected before we merge?
test_cases.rationale: Independent acceptance of browser-facing work belongs in frontend-evaluator.

test_cases.input: I have an idea for a new product. We should build an AI code reviewer.
test_cases.rationale: Greenfield product definition routes to labs21-product-suite.
